# TileShell — Codebase Reference

**Purpose:** Complete codebase reference for onboarding a new Claude session. Copy this file's content as the first message in any new session. Generated by reading actual source files, not just documentation.

---

## What this project is

TileShell is a production Android **default HOME replacement launcher** recreating the Windows Phone / Windows Mobile 10 Start screen. Features: live tiles, 4-column dense grid, horizontal pager (Feed ↔ Start ↔ App List), WP-style personalization, and per-app notification/media integration.

- **Package:** `com.tileshell`
- **Min SDK:** 26, **Target SDK:** latest stable
- **Build:** `./gradlew :app:assembleDebug`
- **Tests:** `./gradlew testDebugUnitTest`
- **Install:** `adb install -r app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk`
- **Set as home:** `adb shell cmd package set-home-activity com.tileshell/.MainActivity`
- **Current tag:** `v0.9` (release candidate)
- **CI:** `.github/workflows/build-apk.yml` (note: `dl.google.com` is blocked in the sandbox — verify Gradle locally)

---

## Stack & Architecture

**Kotlin + Jetpack Compose, MVVM, unidirectional data flow:**

```
Room/DataStore → Repository → ViewModel (StateFlow) → Compose UI
```

**Modules:**

| Module | Contents |
|---|---|
| `:app` | `MainActivity`, `LockAccessibilityService`, `LockAdminReceiver`, `ScreenLock` |
| `:core:design` | Design tokens, tile icons, glass/blur math, `TileStyle`, `TileAccents`, `ThemeLocals`, `ColorTokens` |
| `:core:data` | `TileModel`, `TileSize`, `LayoutRepository`, `SettingsRepository`, `AppCatalog`, Room DB, DataStore codecs, seed logic |
| `:feature:start` | `StartScreen`, `StartViewModel`, `DenseTileGrid`, `GridPacker`, `FeedPage`, widget host, wallpaper, Bing history |
| `:feature:livetiles` | All live tile faces, flip engine, `NotificationCenter`, `WeatherWork`, `BingWallpaperWork`, `FeedWork`, `RssFeed` |
| `:feature:applist` | `AppListScreen`, `AppListViewModel`, `AppListFilter` |
| `:feature:personalize` | `PersonalizeSheet`, `AboutSheet`, `CategoryFolderSheet` |
| `:feature:system` | `DefaultLauncher` |
| `:macrobenchmark` | Baseline profile generator, startup + scroll benchmarks |

**No analytics SDKs. No `QUERY_ALL_PACKAGES` — uses `<queries>` with LAUNCHER category.**

---

## Normative Design Values (treat as constants, from HTML prototype)

```
Grid:        4 columns default (user-selectable 4/5/6), dense back-fill packing
Tile sizes:  small 1×1 / medium 2×2 / wide 4×2 / large 4×4
             (large gated: music/news app tiles only, 5/6-column grids only)
             ref unit 90px, gap 3px, side margin 9px on 393px width
Long-press:  430ms (tiles), 450ms (app list pin); cancel threshold 7px
Merge zone:  inner 22–78% of target tile on both axes
Pager:       Start translates −22% + fades to 0.4 when app list opens
             commit at 50%; activate when |dx|>12px && |dx|>1.2|dy|
Live tiles:  random tile flips every ~2.6 s
             photos cross-fade ~3.0 s (never flips)
             people mosaic cell refresh ~2.1 s
             all paused in edit mode / off-screen / battery saver
Glass alpha: a = 0.62·(1−t)+0.05  (t = transparency slider 0..1)
             dark fill rgb(18,18,24)  /  light fill rgb(250,250,252)
```

**Color tokens (from `ColorTokens.kt`):**

| Token | Dark | Light |
|---|---|---|
| `bg` | `#0A0A0D` | `#ECE9E4` |
| `fg` | `#F6F6F8` | `#14141A` |
| `sheet` | `#16161C` | `#F7F5F1` |

**14 Accent colours (from `TileAccents.kt`) — id → hex:**

```
blue    #2B78E4    cobalt  #1452CC    purple  #6B3FD4    magenta #C4287E
red     #D6262B    orange  #E5641E    amber   #E2A200    lime    #7CB518
green   #1F9E57    teal    #0F9B9B    cyan    #1399C6    steel   #5A6B7B
mauve   #9B6A8F    slate   #3A4554
```

`TileAccents.forId(id)` falls back to Blue for unknown ids. `TileAccents.colorForOverride(override, globalAccentId)` resolves in order: `#RRGGBB` hex string → palette id → global accent. `TileAccents.nearestAccentId(color)` uses luminance-weighted RGB distance (green weighted highest).

**Icon style:** original monoline icons ported from `design/windows-mobile-launcher-for-android/project/launcher/icons.js`. Never use Microsoft assets.

**Label style:** lowercase via styling.

The authoritative prototype is at `design/windows-mobile-launcher-for-android/project/` — read the relevant JS/CSS file when implementing a feature; do NOT guess values.

---

## Key Data Models (`core/data`)

### `TileModel` (sealed interface)

```kotlin
sealed interface TileModel {
    val id: String
    val position: Int      // grid order (dense packer resolves col/row from this)
    val size: TileSize
    val colorId: String    // palette id for the base colour

    data class App(
        override val id: String, override val position: Int,
        override val size: TileSize, override val colorId: String,
        val packageName: String, val activityName: String,
        val label: String?, val iconKey: String? = null,
        val accentOverride: String? = null,   // per-tile colour override (FR-7)
    ) : TileModel

    data class Folder(
        override val id: String, override val position: Int,
        override val size: TileSize, override val colorId: String,
        val name: String, val children: List<FolderChild>,
        val accentOverride: String? = null,
    ) : TileModel
}
```

**Note:** `TileModel` uses `position: Int` (ordering), not `col`/`row`. Grid placement coordinates are computed on the fly by `GridPacker` from the ordered tile list.

### `FolderChild`

```kotlin
data class FolderChild(
    val packageName: String, val activityName: String,
    val label: String?, val iconKey: String? = null,
    val size: TileSize = TileSize.MEDIUM,   // SMALL or MEDIUM only inside folders
    val rowId: Long = 0,                    // Room primary key, used for position updates
    val accentOverride: String? = null,
)
```

### `TileSize` (enum)

```kotlin
enum class TileSize(val cols: Int, val rows: Int) {
    SMALL(1, 1), MEDIUM(2, 2), WIDE(4, 2), LARGE(4, 4);

    fun next(largeAllowed: Boolean = false): TileSize = when (this) {
        MEDIUM -> SMALL
        SMALL  -> WIDE
        WIDE   -> if (largeAllowed) LARGE else MEDIUM
        LARGE  -> MEDIUM
    }
}
```

**Resize cycle (FR-3.4):** MEDIUM → SMALL → WIDE → MEDIUM by default. For **music/news app tiles on a 5/6-column grid** (`AppCategories.allowsLargeTile(iconKey, app, columns)`) wide steps up to LARGE: MEDIUM → SMALL → WIDE → LARGE → MEDIUM. `StartViewModel.resize` computes `largeAllowed` from the tile's catalogue category + `settings.columns`.
**Large auto-shrink:** dropping the grid to 4 columns demotes every LARGE tile to MEDIUM (`StartViewModel.setColumns` → `LayoutRepository.demoteLargeTiles` → DAO bulk `UPDATE … WHERE size='LARGE'`).
**Folder child resize:** SMALL ↔ MEDIUM only (no WIDE/LARGE inside folders; WIDE/LARGE tiles merged in are demoted to MEDIUM, and a LARGE merge target makes a WIDE folder tile — `TileMerge.clampForFolder` / `clampFolderTile`).
**Legacy LARGE** rows decode via Room converter's `runCatching { TileSize.valueOf(name) }.getOrDefault(TileSize.MEDIUM)` — with LARGE back in the enum, `valueOf("LARGE")` succeeds (but post-S24 builds already re-persisted those rows as MEDIUM, so nothing resurrects).

### `LauncherSettings` (flat key=value DataStore via `SettingsCodec`)

```kotlin
data class LauncherSettings(
    val followSystemTheme: Boolean = true,   // follows device dark mode
    val dark: Boolean = true,                // manual theme when followSystemTheme=false
    val accentId: String = "blue",           // global accent id
    val glass: Boolean = true,               // transparent-tile mode
    val transparency: Float = 0.55f,         // 0..1, used in glass alpha formula
    val blur: Boolean = false,
    val wallpaperId: String = "aurora",      // bundled gradient id
    val customWallpaperUri: String? = null,  // file:// URI of picked/Bing photo
    val bingWallpaper: Boolean = false,
    val tiledWallpaper: Boolean = false,     // "wallpaper behind tiles" mode
    val feedEnabled: Boolean = true,
    val wallpaperAlignX: Float = 0.5f,      // focal point 0..1
    val wallpaperAlignY: Float = 0.5f,
    val cornerRadius: Float = 0f,            // 0..20f (clamped on decode)
    val tileGap: Float = 3f,                // 0..16f dp (clamped on decode)
    val tileColorSource: TileColorSource = TileColorSource.GLOBAL_ACCENT,
    val tileFill: TileFill = TileFill.FLAT,
    val fontStyle: FontStyle = FontStyle.OUTFIT,  // default is OUTFIT, not SYSTEM
    val columns: Int = 4,                    // 4/5/6 small-tile columns (MIN=4, MAX=6)
)
```

**Codec keys** (in `SettingsCodec.encode`): `followSystemTheme`, `dark`, `accent`, `glass`, `transparency`, `blur`, `wallpaper`, `customWallpaper`, `bingWallpaper`, `tiledWallpaper`, `feedEnabled`, `wallAlignX`, `wallAlignY`, `cornerRadius`, `tileGap`, `tileColorSource`, `tileFill`, `fontStyle`, `columns`.

**Enums:** `TileFill { FLAT, GRADIENT }`, `FontStyle { SYSTEM, OUTFIT, NUNITO }`, `TileColorSource { GLOBAL_ACCENT, APP_ICON }`.

---

## Room DB (`TileShellDatabase`)

**Schema version 5.** DB file: `tileshell.db`.

**Tables:**

| Table | Entity | Key columns |
|---|---|---|
| `tiles` | `TileEntity` | `id` (PK), `position`, `size`, `colorId`, `accentOverride`, `type` ("app"/"folder"), `packageName`, `activityName`, `label`, `iconKey`, `folderId` |
| `folders` | `FolderEntity` | `id` (PK), `name` |
| `folder_children` | `FolderChildEntity` | `rowId` (autoGenerate PK), `folderId` (FK→folders, CASCADE), `position`, `packageName`, `activityName`, `label`, `iconKey`, `size`, `accentOverride` |
| `app_cache` | `AppCacheEntity` | `component` (PK = "pkg/activity"), `packageName`, `activityName`, `label`, `letter`, `lastSeen` |

**Important:** Folder tiles reuse their own `id` as the `folderId` (folder tile id == folder meta id — see DECISIONS.md S5).

**Migrations:**
- v1→v2: add `iconKey` to tiles + folder_children
- v2→v3: add `size TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'MEDIUM'` to folder_children
- v3→v4: add nullable `accentOverride` to tiles
- v4→v5: add nullable `accentOverride` to folder_children

**Corruption-safe init:** `fallbackToDestructiveMigration()` + force-open `openHelper.readableDatabase` at startup. `SQLiteException` → delete DB + rebuild. Either way comes up empty and `seedIfEmpty()` re-seeds.

**Room relations:**
- `TileWithFolder` — `TileEntity` + optional `FolderWithChildren` (assembled by Room via `@Relation`)
- `FolderWithChildren` — `FolderEntity` + `List<FolderChildEntity>`

---

## `LayoutDao` — Key Methods

```kotlin
fun observeTiles(): Flow<List<TileWithFolder>>          // live ordered tiles
suspend fun tilesOnce(): List<TileWithFolder>           // one-shot snapshot
suspend fun tileCount(): Int
suspend fun appTileCount(packageName: String): Int      // pin de-dupe check
suspend fun maxPosition(): Int                          // -1 when empty
suspend fun updateTilePosition(id: String, position: Int)
suspend fun updateTileSize(id: String, size: String)
suspend fun updateTileAccent(id: String, accentOverride: String?)
suspend fun removeTile(id: String)                      // deletes tile + folder meta
suspend fun applyOrder(orderedIds: List<String>)        // @Transaction renumber
suspend fun applyMerge(folderTile, folder, children, dragTileId, dragFolderId?, survivingOrder)
suspend fun removeFolderChild(folderId, packageName, activityName, newTileId, newTileColorId)
suspend fun removeApp(packageName: String)              // uninstall: tiles + children + empty folders
suspend fun replaceLayout(tiles, folders, children)     // atomic full reset
suspend fun createFolder(folderTile, folder, children)  // category folders
suspend fun updateFolderContents(folderId, children)    // re-creates children in place
suspend fun updateFolderName(id, name)
suspend fun folderByName(name: String): FolderEntity?
suspend fun updateFolderChildPosition(rowId: Long, position: Int)
suspend fun updateFolderChildSize(rowId: Long, size: TileSize)
suspend fun convertFolderTileToApp(id, packageName, activityName, label, iconKey)
```

---

## `LayoutRepository` — Key Methods

```kotlin
val tiles: Flow<List<TileModel>>
suspend fun removeApp(packageName: String)
suspend fun reorderTiles(orderedIds: List<String>)
suspend fun cycleTileSize(id: String)          // calls TileSize.next()
suspend fun setTileAccent(id: String, accentOverride: String?)
suspend fun removeTile(id: String)
suspend fun renameFolder(id: String, name: String)
suspend fun removeFolderChild(folderId: String, child: FolderChild)
    // re-pins app as "pin-<pkg>-<ts>", dissolves/deletes folder if ≤1 child left
suspend fun mergeTiles(dragId, targetId, survivingOrder)
    // calls computeMerge(), then dao.applyMerge()
suspend fun pinApp(app: AppEntry): PinResult   // PinResult.PINNED or ALREADY_ON_START
suspend fun createFolder(name: String, apps: List<AppEntry>): Boolean
suspend fun resizeFolderChild(rowId: Long, size: TileSize)
suspend fun reorderFolderChildren(orderedRowIds: List<Long>)
suspend fun addDefaultTile(appId: String): Boolean
suspend fun seedIfEmpty()
suspend fun resetLayout()
```

## `StartViewModel` — StateFlows & Actions

**StateFlows:**
```kotlin
val tiles: StateFlow<List<TileModel>>
val settings: StateFlow<LauncherSettings>
val apps: StateFlow<List<AppEntry>>          // live installed-app catalogue
val feedSources: StateFlow<List<FeedSource>>
val homeRequests: SharedFlow<Unit>
val isAppList: StateFlow<Boolean>
val swipeEnabled: StateFlow<Boolean>
val editMode: StateFlow<Boolean>
val selectedTileId: StateFlow<String?>
val openFolderId: StateFlow<String?>
val personalizeOpen: StateFlow<Boolean>
val aboutOpen: StateFlow<Boolean>
val foldersOpen: StateFlow<Boolean>
```

**Write discipline:**
- All layout mutations run on `writeContext = Dispatchers.IO.limitedParallelism(1)` (serialized)
- Reorder commits debounced 120 ms via `DROP_OLDEST` `MutableSharedFlow` → `.debounce()`
- All settings writes use plain `Dispatchers.IO`

**Key actions:** `enterEdit(tileId)`, `exitEdit()`, `goHome()`, `reorder(orderedIds)`, `resize(id)`, `unpin(id)`, `merge(dragId, targetId, survivingOrder)`, `setTileColor(id, colorId?)`, `openFolder(id)`, `closeFolder()`, `renameFolder(id, name)`, `removeFolderChild(folderId, child)`, `resizeFolderChild(child)` (SMALL↔MEDIUM), `reorderFolderChildren(orderedChildren)`, `createFolder(name, apps)`, `resetLayout()`, `addLiveTile(appId)`, `setAccent(accentId)`, `setGlass(glass)`, `setTransparency(transparency)`, `setBlur(blur)`, `setWallpaper(wallpaperId)`, `setCustomWallpaper(uri, alignX, alignY)`, `setBingWallpaper(on)`, `applyBingImage(imageUrl)`, `setWallpaperAlignment(alignX, alignY)`, `setTiledWallpaper(on)`, `setFeedEnabled(enabled)`, `setCornerRadius(radius)`, `setTileGap(gap)`, `setTileColorSource(source)`, `setTileFill(fill)`, `setFontStyle(style)`, `setColumns(columns)`, `resetTileStyle()`, `addFeedSource(url, name)`, `removeFeedSource(url)`, `setFeedSourceEnabled(url, enabled)`, `setFeedCategoryEnabled(category, enabled)`, `refreshFeeds()`.

---

## Core Algorithms

### Grid Packer (`feature/start/GridPacker.kt`)

```kotlin
object GridPacker {
    const val COLUMNS = 4

    fun pack(tiles: List<TileSpec>, columns: Int = COLUMNS): List<TilePlacement>
    fun rowCount(placements: List<TilePlacement>): Int
}

data class TileSpec(val id: String, val size: TileSize)
data class TilePlacement(val id: String, val size: TileSize, val col: Int, val row: Int)
```

Algorithm: scan grid top-left row-by-row for the first cell where the tile's full footprint fits. Restarts at top for each tile → small tiles back-fill holes left by larger tiles. `columns` param supports 4/5/6. Tile wider than grid is clamped to `columns`. Pure and deterministic.

### Tile Merge (`core/data/TileMerge.kt`)

```kotlin
fun computeMerge(drag: TileModel, target: TileModel): MergeResult
data class MergeResult(val folderId: String, val size: TileSize, val colorId: String,
                       val name: String, val children: List<FolderChild>)
```

Rules (from `computeMerge`):
- **Target is a Folder:** dragged apps appended after target's children, de-duped by `"pkg/activity"`. Folder keeps its own size/color/name.
- **Target is an App:** new folder using target's id. Children = target's app + dragged apps, de-duped. Size = target's (SMALL is promoted to MEDIUM). Color = target's. Name = `"folder"`.
- WIDE children are demoted to MEDIUM (folder child resize is SMALL↔MEDIUM only).

Drop zones (FR-3.3): outer 0–22% / 78–100% = reorder; inner 22–78% on both axes = merge.

### Glass Alpha (`core/design/Glass.kt`)

```kotlin
object Glass {
    fun alpha(transparency: Float): Float = (0.62f * (1f - transparency) + 0.05f).coerceIn(0f, 1f)
    fun fill(dark: Boolean, transparency: Float): Color
        // dark: rgb(18,18,24,a)   light: rgb(250,250,252,a)
}
```

---

## Live Tiles System (`feature/livetiles`)

### Gate (`LiveTilesGate.kt`)

```kotlin
@Composable
fun rememberLiveTilesActive(suspended: Boolean): Boolean
```

Active only when ALL of: lifecycle `RESUMED`, battery saver off (`ACTION_POWER_SAVE_MODE_CHANGED`), `ANIMATOR_DURATION_SCALE ≠ 0` (ContentObserver), AND caller's `suspended` flag is false.

Caller suspends when: edit mode, app list >50% open, folder/personalize overlay open.

### Flip Engine (`FlipTile.kt`)

```kotlin
@Composable
fun FlipTile(flipped: Boolean, front: @Composable BoxScope.() -> Unit,
             back: @Composable BoxScope.() -> Unit, modifier: Modifier = Modifier)

@Composable
fun rememberFlipState(liveIds: List<String>, active: Boolean): FlipState
```

- X-axis 3D flip: `rotationX` 0°→180°, `cameraDistance = 16f * density`
- Front shows at rotation ≤ 90°; back counter-rotated 180° at rotation > 90°
- 500 ms, `CubicBezierEasing(0.5f, 0.05f, 0.2f, 1f)` (prototype `cubic-bezier(.5,.05,.2,1)`)
- Scheduler: `delay(2600)` then `pickFlipTarget(liveIds)` toggles one random flippable tile
- Ids scrolled out of `liveIds` are pruned from `FlipState`

### `LiveFace` enum (`LiveFace.kt`)

```kotlin
enum class LiveFace(val flips: Boolean) {
    CLOCK(true), WEATHER(true), CALENDAR(true), MAIL(true),
    MESSAGES(true), PEOPLE(true), PHOTOS(false), MUSIC(true);

    companion object {
        fun forIconKey(iconKey: String?, size: TileSize): LiveFace?
        // Returns null for SMALL tiles always; maps icon key to face for MEDIUM/WIDE
    }
}
```

Icon key → face mapping: `"clock"→CLOCK`, `"weather"→WEATHER`, `"calendar"→CALENDAR`, `"mail"→MAIL`, `"messages"→MESSAGES`, `"people"→PEOPLE`, `"photos"→PHOTOS`, `"music"→MUSIC`, else `null`.

### Live Face implementations

| Face | File | Key behaviour |
|---|---|---|
| Clock | `ClockTile.kt` | Front: time/weekday/date. Back: date/alarm. Ticks on minute boundary. Alarm is static placeholder "7:00". |
| Weather | `WeatherTile.kt` | `OpenMeteoWeatherProvider` (free, no key). `WeatherRefreshWorker` 30-min periodic + immediate. Coarse GPS → `Geocoder` for city. `manualCity` fallback. No manual-city UI yet. |
| Calendar | `CalendarTile.kt` | `READ_CALENDAR` opt-in. Next 2 events from `CalendarContract.Instances` (36-h window). Re-queries every 5 min. |
| People | `PeopleTile.kt` | `READ_CONTACTS` opt-in. ≤12 contacts with photos. 2×2 mosaic (medium) / 4×2 (wide). Cell refresh every 2.1 s; never repeats on-screen photos. |
| Photos | `PhotosTile.kt` | Cross-fades every 3.0 s. Images from `PhotosStore` (`file://` URIs copied to `filesDir/livephotos/`). `flips=false` — excluded from flip scheduler. |
| Mail / Messages | `ConversationTile.kt` | Binds to tile's own package. Front: sender + snippet. Back: unread count. |
| Music | `MusicTile.kt` | `MediaSessionManager.getActiveSessions`. Prefers `STATE_PLAYING` session. EQ bars animate every 240 ms while playing. 2 s poll for in-session changes. All calls `runCatching`-guarded. |
| Notification (generic) | `NotificationTile.kt` | Any medium+ app tile with an active notification. Never flips. Not gated by `liveActive`. Falls through: now-playing (own package) → notification → static glyph. |

### Notification System (`NotificationCenter.kt`)

Key types:
```kotlin
data class NotificationItem(packageName, title, text, isClearable, isGroupSummary, postTime)
data class ConversationPreview(sender, snippet, count)
data class NotificationImages(avatar: Bitmap?, picture: Bitmap?)  // capped at 600px
data class NotificationSnapshot(badges: Map<String,Int>, conversations: Map<String,ConversationPreview>)
data class TileNotificationAction(contentIntent: PendingIntent?, keys: List<String>)
```

```kotlin
object NotificationCenter {
    val snapshot: StateFlow<NotificationSnapshot>
    val images: StateFlow<Map<String, NotificationImages>>  // separate flow (bitmaps)
    // actions + listener held @Volatile, not StateFlow (no recomposition)

    fun publish(snapshot: NotificationSnapshot)
    fun publishActions(actions: Map<String, TileNotificationAction>)
    fun publishImages(images: Map<String, NotificationImages>)
    fun bindListener(service: NotificationListenerService)
    fun unbindListener(service: NotificationListenerService)
    fun openAndClear(context: Context, packageName: String): Boolean
        // Opens content intent (API 34+: with BACKGROUND_ACTIVITY_START_ALLOWED)
        // + cancels all that package's notifications. Returns true if intent launched.
    fun clear()
}
```

Pure functions: `summarizeNotifications(items)` — drops ongoing + group-summary rows, counts per package, newest as preview. `initials(name)` — first+last word initials, falls back to `"·"`.

`TileNotificationListenerService` declared in `:feature:livetiles` library manifest (merges into `:app`). Reconnects via `requestRebind()` on disconnect.

Notification bitmap cap: `EXTRA_PICTURE` bitmaps downscaled to max 600 px (longest axis) before storing in `_images` to prevent OOM.

OEM battery guidance (`OemBatteryGuard`): tries standard `REQUEST_IGNORE_BATTERY_OPTIMIZATIONS` dialog first, then navigates to OEM-specific battery management (Xiaomi/Huawei/OPPO/Vivo/OnePlus). Contextual "fix ›" row in PersonalizeSheet appears only when `notificationsEnabled && !batteryOptimizationExempt`.

### Media Center

Process-wide `StateFlow<Map<package, NowPlaying>>`. Single `MediaSessionsEffect` on Start (one `MediaSessionManager` listener + 2 s poll). Generic app tiles fall through: now-playing (own package) → notification → static glyph.

---

## Feed Page (`feature/start/feed`)

Pager position −1 (swipe right from Start). `feedEnabled = false` hides it entirely.

**Glance tab:** Google search pill, date + live 12-hour clock, `WeatherCard`, `AgendaCard` (calendar events, taps open calendar app), `NowPlayingCard` (album art + transport controls, taps open music app), widget slot.

**News tab:** RSS article list with thumbnail, source, time-ago via `ArticleCard`.

### RSS/Atom Engine (`feature/livetiles/RssFeed.kt`)
- Pure RSS 2.0 + Atom parser (javax.xml DOM, namespace-unaware)
- Extracts: title, link, source, category, image, published time
- `parseFeedDate` handles RFC-822 + RFC-3339; `stripHtml`; `feedAgo` (now/Xm/Xh/Xd)
- `FeedRefreshWorker` — 30-min periodic + immediate one-off; dedupes by link, caps at 40 articles
- `FeedStore` — DataStore (`news_feed.pb`, tolerant tab-delimited codec)
- 10 default India feeds + Google News; 8 categories: nation, state, entertainment, cricket, sports, tech, business, food, custom
- Remote image loading: `HttpURLConnection` (follows redirects, http→https upgrade, browser-like User-Agent, `LruCache`)

### Widget Host (`feature/start/feed/WidgetHost.kt`)
- `FeedAppWidgetHost` (custom `AppWidgetHost`) on glance tab
- Multiple widgets; vertical resize by drag (±24 dp steps, 72–720 dp)
- Long-press reveals edit overlay (edit/remove + drag handle)
- Persisted in `WidgetStore` DataStore (`widget_store.pb`)
- Uninstalled providers self-remove on next load

---

## Personalization (`feature/personalize/PersonalizeSheet.kt`)

Sheet sections in order: theme → accent colour → wallpaper → tile style → typography → grid columns → live tiles → live photos → folders → permissions → notifications → system → about.

Key controls:
- **Tile style group:** transparent tiles toggle, glass/blur toggles, transparency slider, corner radius slider (0–20 dp, stored as `cornerRadius: Float`), gradient fill toggle, "reset tile style" button
- **Tile colour source:** global accent vs app-icon dominant colour toggle
- **Per-tile accent (edit mode):** palette icon → inline picker showing: dominant icon colour, nearest palette accent, all 14 swatches. Stored as `accentOverride: String?`. Value is either a `#RRGGBB` hex or a palette id.
- **Tile spacing:** `tileGap` slider 0–16 dp; suppressed (forced to prototype default) when "wallpaper behind tiles" is on
- **Wallpaper group:** 6 gradient swatches, custom photo picker (Android Photo Picker → copies to `filesDir/wallpaper/`), Bing daily wallpaper toggle, "recent bing wallpapers" row → `BingHistorySheet`, "adjust position" → `WallpaperCropOverlay`
- **Tiled wallpaper mode:** tiles render wallpaper as screen-anchored windows (parallax-correct). Suppresses glass mode.
- **Typography:** System / Outfit / Nunito via `LocalTileFont`
- **Grid columns:** 4 / 5 / 6
- **Notifications:** deep-link to `Settings.ACTION_NOTIFICATION_LISTENER_SETTINGS`; battery optimisation fix row (contextual, only when `notificationsEnabled && !batteryOptimizationExempt`)
- **About:** `AboutSheet` — feature groups + dev stack + version from `PackageManager`

---

## Tile Colour Priority Chain

```
accentOverride (#RRGGBB hex OR palette id)
    → app-icon dominant colour (when TileColorSource.APP_ICON)
    → global settings.accentId
```

`accentOverride` is preserved through: folder merges, folder dissolves, child pull-outs (carried on `FolderChildEntity`).

**Tile fill:** `TileFill.GRADIENT` → `tileGradientBrush(accent)` (diagonal +15% light → −30% dark). `TileFill.FLAT` → solid `background(accent)`.

---

## Wallpaper System (`feature/start/WallpaperBackground.kt`)

- `WallpaperBackground` draws gradient or photo with optional `blur(18dp)` + scale 1.12 (RenderEffect, API 31+; no-op below)
- Custom photo: `MediaImport` copies bytes to `filesDir/wallpaper/` as `file://` URI (timestamped; no persistable grant needed; survives reboot)
- Glass mode: tile fill = `Glass.fill(dark, transparency)` + inset `glassLine` + per-tile accent dot on small tiles
- Bing wallpaper: `BingWallpaperWorker` fetches `HPImageArchive.aspx` JSON, downloads JPEG → `filesDir/bing_wallpaper.jpg`, writes `file://` URI with `?v=<ts>` cache-buster into `customWallpaperUri`. 24-h periodic. `BingHistorySheet` shows last ~8 days (idx 0 and 8, ~8 images).
- `WallpaperCropOverlay` — focal-point reframe; calls `setWallpaperAlignment` only (image untouched); alignment persists across Bing daily refreshes
- `setBingImage` no longer resets alignment

---

## Folder System

- Folder tile shows 4-icon mini-grid face
- Full-screen `FolderOverlay`: title, close button, grid of children, launch-and-dismiss, scrim dismiss
- Long-press title → rename (persisted)
- Children: pull-out drag (long-press lifts, release >~70% tile width away → `removeFolderChild`). Pull-out re-pins app as fresh Start tile. Folder with 1 child left → `convertFolderTileToApp` (keeps slot/size/color, drops folder meta). 0 children → tile + meta deleted.
- Folder children resize: SMALL ↔ MEDIUM only (`resizeFolderChild` in ViewModel)
- Folder grid inherits `tileGap` from settings

---

## Screen Lock (`app/`)

Long-press the settings gear icon on the Start screen.
- **API 29+:** `LockAccessibilityService` → `GLOBAL_ACTION_LOCK_SCREEN` (preserves biometric). Requires manual enable in Android Settings → Accessibility.
- **API 26–28:** `LockAdminReceiver` → `DevicePolicyManager.lockNow()` (clears PIN).

---

## App List (`feature/applist`)

- Alphabetical lazy list with lowercase letter section headers
- Row: small accent tile icon + app name; tap to launch
- Live package updates (install/uninstall/update via `LauncherApps.Callback`)
- Search: live case-insensitive filter, "no apps found" empty state
- Jump grid: full-screen a–z; disabled letters greyed; tap scrolls to section
- Long-press 450 ms (7 px cancel) → pins as MEDIUM tile, returns to Start, toasts "pinned X" / "already on start"

---

## Accessibility (S27)

- Each tile: single `clearAndSetSemantics` button (name + unread count; `onClick` = launch)
- Drag ops as `CustomAccessibilityAction`s (resize/unpin/move/done/customize)
- `AppRow` gains launch `onClick` + "pin to start" custom action
- 48 dp minimum touch targets
- Animations-off: `rememberJigglePhase` returns 0 when `ANIMATOR_DURATION_SCALE == 0`
- `displayCutoutPadding()` on Start + app-list columns
- Font scale verified to 1.3×
- RTL: standard layouts mirror via `LayoutDirection`; dense grid stays LTR by design

---

## Performance (`:macrobenchmark`)

- Baseline-profile plugin; cold start ≈260 ms (budget ≤800 ms) with shipped baseline profile
- `compose_stability.conf` — tiles are `restartable skippable`
- Jank percentiles need a physical device

---

## Permissions

```xml
INTERNET
ACCESS_COARSE_LOCATION
READ_CALENDAR
READ_CONTACTS
REQUEST_IGNORE_BATTERY_OPTIMIZATIONS
<!-- Service-declared (not uses-permission): -->
BIND_NOTIFICATION_LISTENER_SERVICE
BIND_ACCESSIBILITY_SERVICE
BIND_DEVICE_ADMIN
```

No `QUERY_ALL_PACKAGES`. Uses `<queries>` with LAUNCHER category + role intents.

---

## Key File Locations

```
app/src/main/java/com/tileshell/
  MainActivity.kt                          entry point, default-launcher prompt
  LockAccessibilityService.kt              API 29+ screen lock
  LockAdminReceiver.kt                     API 26–28 screen lock
  ScreenLock.kt                            lock dispatch logic

core/data/src/main/java/com/tileshell/core/data/
  TileModel.kt                             sealed interface: App, Folder; FolderChild
  TileSize.kt                              SMALL/MEDIUM/WIDE + next() cycle + Room converter
  TileMerge.kt                             computeMerge() + MergeResult
  TileColors.kt                            TileColors.defaultIdFor(), TileColors.IDS
  LayoutRepository.kt                      all tile/folder ops; roleIconKeyMap
  AppCatalog.kt / AppCatalogRepository.kt  installed app enumeration + live updates
  AppLauncher.kt                           LauncherApps dispatch
  AppEntry.kt                              data class: packageName, activityName, label, letter
  PinResult.kt                             enum: PINNED, ALREADY_ON_START
  settings/LauncherSettings.kt             LauncherSettings + SettingsCodec + enums
  settings/SettingsRepository.kt           DataStore read/write
  db/TileShellDatabase.kt                  Room DB v5, corruption-safe init, all migrations
  db/LayoutDao.kt                          all tile/folder CRUD (see methods above)
  db/LayoutEntities.kt                     TileEntity, FolderEntity, FolderChildEntity,
                                           AppCacheEntity, TileWithFolder, FolderWithChildren,
                                           Converters (TileSize ↔ String)
  seed/DefaultLayout.kt                    WP default tile list (liveOnly flag)
  seed/LayoutSeeder.kt                     first-run + reset seed logic
  seed/RoleResolver.kt                     role→package resolution (AndroidRoleResolver)

core/design/src/main/java/com/tileshell/core/design/
  TileAccents.kt                           14 accents, forId(), colorForOverride(), nearestAccentId()
  Glass.kt                                 alpha() formula, fill()

  TileIcons.kt                             monoline ImageVector icon set
  ThemeLocals.kt                           CompositionLocals (font, corner, fill)
  ColorTokens.kt                           DarkColorTokens, LightColorTokens, colorTokens(dark)
  Wallpapers.kt                            6 gradient wallpaper brushes

feature/start/src/main/java/com/tileshell/feature/start/
  StartScreen.kt                           main composable, pager, edit mode, overlays
  StartViewModel.kt                        StateFlows + all user actions (see above)

  WallpaperBackground.kt                   gradient + photo + blur rendering
  WallpaperCropOverlay.kt                  focal-point reframe UI
  BingHistorySheet.kt                      Bing wallpaper history picker
  FirstRunHint.kt                          one-time first-run hint card
  MediaImport.kt                           photo picker → filesDir copy
  feed/FeedPage.kt                         Feed screen (glance + news tabs)
  feed/WidgetHost.kt / WidgetSlot.kt       Android widget hosting
  feed/WidgetStore.kt                      widget persistence
  feed/RemoteImage.kt                      remote image loader with LruCache
  feed/FeedFormat.kt                       article time-ago formatting

feature/livetiles/src/main/java/com/tileshell/feature/livetiles/
  LiveFace.kt                              enum + forIconKey() + pickFlipTarget()
  FlipTile.kt                              FlipTile composable + rememberFlipState()
  LiveTilesGate.kt                         rememberLiveTilesActive()
  ClockTile.kt                             clock face
  WeatherTile.kt / WeatherWork.kt          weather face + WorkManager worker
  WeatherProvider.kt / OpenMeteoWeather.kt weather API (Open-Meteo, free, no key)
  WeatherCache.kt                          weather DataStore cache
  CalendarTile.kt / CalendarSource.kt      calendar face + data query
  PeopleTile.kt / ContactsSource.kt        people mosaic + contacts query
  PhotosTile.kt / PhotosStore.kt           photos slideshow + DataStore
  MusicTile.kt                             music face (MediaSessionManager)
  ConversationTile.kt                      mail/messages face
  NotificationTile.kt                      generic notification face
  NotificationCenter.kt                    NotificationSnapshot, NotificationImages,
                                           TileNotificationAction, summarizeNotifications(),
                                           initials(), tileNotificationActions()
  TileNotificationListenerService.kt       notification listener service
  NotificationAccess.kt                    rememberNotificationAccess()
  AppIcon.kt                               rememberAppIconBitmap() / AppIconCorner
  TileBitmap.kt                            rememberTileBitmap(), sampleSizeFor()
  TileImageBackground.kt                   tiled wallpaper window rendering
  TilePermission.kt                        rememberOptInPermission()
  BingWallpaperWork.kt                     BingWallpaperWorker (ensureScheduled/refreshNow/cancel/applyImage)
  RssFeed.kt                               RSS 2.0 + Atom parser
  FeedStore.kt                             article + feed-settings DataStore
  FeedWork.kt                              FeedRefreshWorker (30-min periodic)
  OemBatteryGuard.kt                       OEM battery optimization guidance

feature/applist/src/main/java/com/tileshell/feature/applist/
  AppListScreen.kt                         app list + search + jump grid
  AppListViewModel.kt
  AppListFilter.kt                         pure search filter (unit tested)

feature/personalize/src/main/java/com/tileshell/feature/personalize/

  AboutSheet.kt                            feature list + stack info

feature/system/src/main/java/com/tileshell/feature/system/

```

---

## Known Issues / Deferred Work

- **Manual city UI** for weather not implemented — `manualCity` field exists in `WeatherCache` but no UI entry point
- **Clock alarm** is a static "7:00" placeholder — no alarm provider yet
- **Glass + light + live text colours** don't adapt (face text stays white)
- **Folder badge aggregation** — folder tiles don't sum child notification counts
- **People mosaic** queries contacts once per grant (no live re-query as contacts change)
- **Photos tile** re-decodes on each slide (no decoded-bitmap cache); revoked URI shows accent fill for that step
- **Notification count** is "active dismissable" not true unread (collapsed summaries under-count)
- **Music tile** polls every 2 s even with no session (no recomposition cost; safe)
- **Feed article read-state** not tracked
- **Widget host** may briefly show blank slot on cold start before `WidgetStore` re-loads
- **RTL grid** stays LTR by design (absolute-offset packing)
- **Pre-Q screen lock** (API 26–28) clears PIN (uses DevicePolicyManager)
- **Wallpaper blur** no-ops below API 31 (requires RenderEffect)
- **`app_cache` table** defined in Room but not yet populated with live data
- **Jank percentiles** need a physical device (macrobenchmark module ready)
- **liveActive suspension** — degraded (static) tiles still in `liveIds` so flip scheduler toggles their state; harmless no-op

---

## Workflow Rules (one session = one task)

1. Read only files needed for the current task — never re-read the full spec docx
2. If something is ambiguous, make the WP-faithful choice, note it in `docs/DECISIONS.md`, and continue
3. Every session must end with `./gradlew :app:assembleDebug` passing + relevant unit tests + a git commit (`feat(sN): <summary>`)
4. Prefer editing existing files over creating parallel ones; no TODO stubs committed
5. Pure logic (packer, merge rules, alpha formula, search filter) gets JUnit tests in the same session it's written
6. After commit, push to origin

---

## Reference: Spec & Prototype

- **Feature spec:** `docs/TileShell-Feature-Specification.docx`
- **Prototype (authoritative for values):** `design/windows-mobile-launcher-for-android/project/`
  - `launcher/styles.css` — colour tokens, glass values, flip easing
  - `launcher/data.js` — accent colours, wallpaper gradients, default tile list
  - `launcher/icons.js` — full icon set (monoline SVG paths → ImageVectors in `:core:design`)
  - `launcher/screens.js` — screen transitions, jump grid behaviour
- **Decisions log:** `docs/DECISIONS.md`
- **Session plan:** `design/SESSION-PLAN.md`
